title: Higher upload limits on Workforms
excerpt:

posts.author: FilipBos (Filip Boś )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, Workforms on Monday.com have restrictive upload limits that hinder the ability to collect rich media or large documentation from users; especially in marketing workflows where high-resolution images, videos, and detailed PDFs are often required. This limitation creates friction in onboarding, campaign submissions, and partner collaboration, forcing users to rely on external tools or fragmented processes.

Increasing the upload limit would streamline data collection, reduce dependency on third-party platforms, and improve the overall user experience for both internal teams and external contributors.

What are you trying to achieve

I’m aiming to simplify and centralize the submission process for marketing assets and partner materials. By allowing larger file uploads directly through Workforms, we can:

Accelerate campaign setup and approvals.
Improve collaboration with brokers and partners.
Reduce manual follow-ups and file transfers.
Enhance the professionalism and completeness of submissions.

This change would directly support smoother workflows and better data integrity across marketing operations.

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Filip,

What is the file size limit that would work for you?

posts.author: FilipBos (Filip Boś )
posts.cookedHtml: Will - so sorry I missed this! 5GB? Not sure what the upload limits are server side.

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
No worries at all Filip.

monday.com has a limit of 500MB I believe. But I might have a solution for this that would work through a cloud storage that would link back to monday.
